title: citrus × aurantium subf. soyu
intro: Citrus × aurantium subf. soyu, also known as bitter orange or zhi shi, is a plant species within the citrus family, characterized by its bitter flavor and numerous medicinal properties. The plant is traditionally used for its digestive and anti-inflammatory properties, and is often employed to alleviate symptoms of indigestion, nausea, and colds. The health benefits of Citrus × aurantium subf. soyu include its ability to improve digestion, reduce anxiety and stress, and even lower blood pressure. In herbal preparations, the plant is commonly used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its ability to balance the body's energy and promote overall well-being.
